5001.Name: 4 Leaf Circlet
5001.Description: Silver circlet adorned with a green gemstone clover. Increases LUCK by 5 and Accuracy by 2. Despite its age it boasts a strange lack of aging

5002.Name: Ancient Mask
5002.Description: Crumbling mask, almost unusable. Increases STR by 5 and Accuracy by 2

5003.Name: Ancient Hood
5003.Description: Moth-eaten hood, almost unusable. Increases AGI by 5 and Accuracy by 2

5004.Name: Ancient Veil
5004.Description: Fading veil, almost unusable. Increases WIS by 5 and Accuracy by 2

5005.Name: Ancient Cuirass
5005.Description: Crumbling cuirass, almost unusable. Increases STR by 5 and Defense by 2

5006.Name: Ancient Harness
5006.Description: Moth-eaten harness, almost unusable. Increases AGI by 5 and Defense by 2

5007.Name: Ancient Tunic
5007.Description: Fading tunic, almost unusable. Increases WIS by 5 and Defense by 2

5008.Name: Ancient Culottes
5008.Description: Crumbling culottes, almost unusable. Increases STR by 6

5009.Name: Ancient Subligar
5009.Description: Moth-eaten subligar, almost unusable. Increases AGI by 6

5010.Name: Ancient Gaskins
5010.Description: Fading gaskins, almost unusable. Increases WIS by 6

5011.Name: Ancient Sabatons
5011.Description: Crumbling Sabatons, almost unusable. Increases STR by 5 and final Speed by 1%

5012.Name: Ancient Longboots
5012.Description: Moth-eaten Longboots, almost unusable. Increases AGI by 5 and Accuracy by 2 and final Speed by 1%

5013.Name: Ancient Boots
5013.Description: Fading Boots, almost unusable. Increases WIS by 5 and Accuracy by 2 and final Speed by 1%

5014.Name: Rusty Knife
5014.Description: Do not cut yourself with it, unless you wanna die a slow death. Has a Weapon Power of 6. Increases LUCK by 2

5015.Name: Ancient Sword
5015.Description: Aged sword, almost unusable. Has a Weapon Power of 7. Increases LUCK by 5

5016.Name: Ancient Axe
5016.Description: Aged axe, almost unusable. Has a Weapon Power of 10. Increases STR by 5

5017.Name: Ancient Bow
5017.Description: Aged bow, almost unusable. Has a Weapon Power of 10. Increases AGI by 5

5018.Name: Ancient Gromire
5018.Description: Aged grimoire, almost unusable. Has a Weapon Power of 10. Increases WIS by 5

5019.Name: Health Potion
5019.Description: Restores 50 health when health drops below 50%

5020.Name: Mana Potion
5020.Description: Restores 50 mana when mana drops below 50%

5021.Name: Oblivion's Egress Vol 1
5021.Description: The first volume of calamity manifest. The beginning of the end...
